levels.title: Soft Launch Ramp
levels.prompt: Draw the fake ramp that makes the ball fall up into the cup.

solution.explanation: The fake up ramp is the only option marked to send the ball to the upper-right cup.

failure: You trusted regular gravity in the fake-gravity Pack. Bold little tragedy.
The ball went down because your plan had the spine of wet paper.
delay: Pick the ramp that literally says up. The floor is not hiring today.
scorecard: You made the ball fall up. Physics is filling out an incident form.

levels.uqiq_moment: The Pack opens by making the correct ramp the one that breaks normal gravity on purpose.

levels.title: Ceiling Cup
levels.prompt: The cup is on the ceiling. Draw the line gravity would hate most.

solution.explanation: The ceiling bridge is the deterministic path that carries the ball to the ceiling cup.

failure: You drew floor furniture for a ceiling cup. Interior design is pressing charges.
The ball stared at your line and chose retirement.
delay: Ceiling cup. Ceiling bridge. The hint is wearing a giant hard hat.
scorecard: You bridged the ceiling. Gravity has been demoted to suggestion.

levels.uqiq_moment: The target sits above the ball, so the win comes from treating the ceiling like the floor.

levels.title: Heavy Bubble
levels.prompt: A heavy bubble wants the top pocket. Draw the line that believes nonsense.

solution.explanation: Bubble lift is the correct fake-physics choice that sends the heavy bubble to the top pocket.

failure: You made the heavy bubble act heavy. Stunning obedience to the wrong universe.
That line had all the lift of a sleepy sandwich.
delay: It says bubble lift. Your hesitation is the heaviest object here.
scorecard: You lifted the heavy bubble. Logic put on a fake mustache and left.

levels.uqiq_moment: The object is labeled heavy, but the correct solution treats it like a bubble anyway.

levels.title: Sideways Rain
levels.prompt: The ball is rain now. Draw the line that sends it sideways into the gutter.

solution.explanation: The sideways gutter is the only draw option that routes the ball to the right-side target.

failure: You let rain fall down. Weather school called and still wants less from you.
The gutter was sideways and your plan showed up wearing vertical shoes.
delay: Sideways rain needs the sideways gutter. This cloud is not subtle.
scorecard: You made rain travel sideways. The forecast is now legally confused.

levels.uqiq_moment: A normal falling object becomes rain that only wins by moving sideways.

levels.title: Gravity Button Hearing
levels.prompt: Tap the button that tells the truth about Pack 6 gravity.

rules.feedback_on_wrong_tap: That button believes in regular gravity. Embarrassing.

solution.explanation: Pack 6 gravity is fake, so the true statement is UP FALLS.

failure: You voted for normal physics in the anti-physics hearing. Tiny gavel, huge shame.
The correct button yelled UP FALLS and you still wandered into the basement.
delay: UP FALLS is the one telling Pack 6's ugly little truth.
scorecard: You ruled that up can fall. The court stenographer needs a nap.

levels.uqiq_moment: The Physics Pack pauses to make the player tap the statement that openly contradicts normal gravity.

levels.title: Anchor Balloon
levels.prompt: The anchor wants to float. Draw the line that gives heavy things bad ideas.

solution.explanation: The balloon hook is the fake-physics path that carries the anchor to the sky ring.

failure: You sank the anchor. Marine biology did not ask for this paperwork.
The sky ring was above it and your idea brought a shovel.
delay: Balloon hook. Heavy object. Fake gravity. Connect the tiny parade.
scorecard: You floated the anchor. The ocean has lost custody.

levels.uqiq_moment: The heavy anchor reaches a sky target by using the least anchor-like draw option.

levels.title: Sink the Cloud
levels.prompt: This cloud belongs in the drain. Draw the line that makes fluff lose.

solution.explanation: The drain slope is the deterministic draw choice that sinks the cloud into the floor drain.

failure: You let the cloud float. It already knew that trick, professor.
The drain was waiting and your line started a weather podcast instead.
delay: Cloud goes down. Drain slope is the rude little slide it deserves.
scorecard: You sank a cloud. The sky is checking the lease.

levels.uqiq_moment: The lightest-looking object wins by being forced downward into a drain.

levels.title: Orbit Receipt
levels.prompt: Flash the fake orbit order, hide it, then rebuild the loop without trusting gravity.

solution.explanation: Repeat the flashed fake orbit order exactly: UP, SIDE, DROP, CUP.

failure: You turned the orbit receipt into alphabet soup with buttons.
The loop flashed once and your buffer went sightseeing.
delay: UP, SIDE, DROP, CUP. It is a fake orbit, not a wedding toast.
scorecard: You rebuilt the orbit receipt. Gravity stopped pretending it had notes.

levels.uqiq_moment: A Physics Pack briefly becomes memory work where the fake gravity path must be recalled as a sequence.

levels.title: Newton Apology Form
levels.prompt: Draw the line that apologizes to Newton by ignoring him completely.

solution.explanation: The apology curve is the intended fake path from the apple start to the signature cup.

failure: You picked lawful floor. The apple yawned in classical mechanics.
That was less apology and more paperwork with shoe prints.
delay: Apology curve. Ignore the apple drop like it owes you rent.
scorecard: You apologized by breaking the rule harder. Academic behavior, somehow.

levels.uqiq_moment: The near-finale frames fake physics as an apology form where the correct answer ignores the famous apple drop.

levels.title: Final Fakefall
levels.prompt: Final fall: draw the path that refuses to fall and still lands in DONE.

solution.explanation: The fakefall ramp is the only final draw option that reaches the DONE cup.

failure: At Level 60 you picked normal fall. The whole Pack just sighed in unison.
The DONE cup was above you and your plan brought gravity back like a bad sequel.
delay: Fakefall ramp ends it. Normal fall is the trap with a diploma.
scorecard: You finished by refusing to fall. DONE has never looked so suspicious.

levels.uqiq_moment: The final Level completes the 60-Level run by making the winning fall go upward into DONE.
